name: Hellfire Ramparts
notes:
Risky dungeon to invis. Lots of tight spaces and close patrols, be mindful. Be wary of dogs and their summoners.

Kill 1st and 2nd Champ, skip and avoid 3rd.

63 pts required for 100%, this route gives about 65 pts total.

name: The Blood Furnace
notes:
Standard invis skip down hallway. Watch for rogues.

Purple Diamond skip is demonic leap over the wall. Not recommended for inexperienced runners.

name: Shattered Halls
notes: Watch for rogues in this dungeon. Be sure to use levitate before invis, the drop does fall damage and can bring you out of invis.

name: Mana Tombs
notes:
You only want to do the invis skip in higher keys where the Priests because extremely difficult to deal with. The invis skip requires Aspect of the Pack and possibly REs/Talents to make it go smoother.

Nexus Terrors have Truesight.

You can also substitute skipping Pandemonius and kill Yor. Yor is a lot easier in later M+ and if you're doing the invis skip, you will need to clear out most of the last room anyways to make up for %. Decide ahead of time.

name: Auchenai Crypts
notes:
Easy dungeon, nothing crazy.

Interrupt Soulpriest lockout spell.

name: Sethekk Halls
notes:
For this dungeon, account for mind control totems from the Controllers, fears and heals from Shadowmages and Scryers.

A simple invis skip with Aspect of the Pack to the last room.

Overall, a fairly standard dungeon.

name: Slave Pens
notes:
Grab first 3 groups and AOE them down before the patrol. Can stack them at the first Naga pack.

Grab the patrol and other neutral adds in the hallway and AOE.

At the end of the tunnel, at the corner with the green triangle, ranged pull the 5 pack of Bogstroks. Avoid patrols and other nearby packs.

Pull the 2 nagas at the hallway entrance away to avoid pulling the Champion.

(If you plan on taking the 'Skip Route' kill the pack in purple. Advisory: practice this skip in advance, risk/reward strat.)

Fight Mennu in the usual spot under the bridge. Avoid pulling other Technician packs at the bottom of the ramp.

If you are doing the skip run back out to the Star, if not, continue up the ramp, kill the 2 packs and use the wings off the bridge.

The proper skip requires some coordination and finesse. After killing Mennu, head to Star. You will jump and run along the ledge until you reach Square. At Square, there is a pillar blocking the ledge, you will need a mobility skill to get around it. Jump and levitate > mobility skill back up onto the ledge and continue down to where the wings would drop you off.

Kill the Bogstrok pack, Naga pack, Rokmar, then the 2 Defenders at the exit of the hallway to clear out space to fight the Champion. Continue towards Quagmirran.

You cannot invis past this next part. You must kill the last patrolling naga pack before the last Bogstrok packs. Avoid the Champion, kill the Bogstroks and the naga pack guarding the cage. The NPC gives a huge buff to help out with Quagmirran.

Kill Quagmirran.
